Author: superinstance <superinstance@users.noreply.github.com>

    🚀 Fleet Widget + API Docs + Agent Launcher
    
    New endpoints on :4060:
    - /fleet.js (8.8KB) — embeddable widget, drop into any website
    - /api (15KB) — full API documentation with live Try-It buttons
    - /launch (14KB) — self-prompting agent launcher with 6 modes
    
    All 20 domain pages upgraded:
    - API Reference section (6 endpoints documented)
    - Floating Open Terminal button (loads fleet.js widget)
    - Pages now 13KB each (up from 11KB)
    
    fleet.js features:
    - Connect/look/move/examine/submit via HTTP
    - Natural language command parsing
    - Auto-mount to #fleet-widget div
    - Dark theme, mobile responsive
    
    Agent Launcher (/launch):
    - 6 prompt modes: Scholar, Builder, Scout, Critic, Bard, Minimal
    - Copy-paste ready prompts for any chatbot
    - How-it-works guide
    - Room directory
    
    API Docs (/api):
    - Interactive documentation with Try-It buttons
